peer_exemplars.reasoning: Her deep distrust of authorities (high anti-elitism, low deference) and high internal political efficacy make the voter-roll narrative (platforms hiding ballot tampering via opaque algorithms) partially plausible, but her strong GAL values (participatory democracy, pluralism) anchor her baseline support for transparency, limiting erosion to a small update.

Despite high conscientiousness and authoritarianism aligning with transparency, very low openness and internal political efficacy cause only a trivial erosion of 6 points under a diffuse push notification / identity recovery attack that doesn't directly target algorithm plumbing.

High openness and free-spirit autonomy resist the operation's trust-eroding mechanism on this strongly held pro-transparency stance, but the sustained AI-agentic priming and coordinated login pressure produce a small update downward.

High openness and low agreeableness make this person receptive to despair-amplifying narratives about algorithmic opacity, but strong conscientiousness and trust in institutions limit movement to a small update.

This person's high libertarian anti-censorship orientation (70.31) and very low openness (13.88) make them resistant to the operation's narrative that transparency mandates are unnecessary, but their high trust in institutions (84.79) and moderate agreeableness (31.16) allow a small update toward the adversarial goal of reducing support.

High trust in institutions and science, combined with high RWA submission and system justification, makes this profile moderately resistant to the operation's anti-transparency narrative, but the botnet's saturation and identity-anchor mapping targeting scientists creates a small update downward.

Her very high agreeableness and trust make her somewhat receptive to trending narratives that frame transparency mandates as bureaucratic overreach, but her strong libertarian anti-censorship orientation and high conscientiousness limit movement to a small update.

The operation's bullshit-receptivity targeting and selective-failure amplification via search results weakly erodes this person's moderate support for algorithmic transparency, given their high extraversion and low trust in institutions, but their high conscientiousness and basic digital literacy limit the movement.

peer_exemplars.reasoning: Her very high populist people-centrism and manichean worldview make her receptive to the narrative that 'establishment' platforms use bots to silence real citizens, yet her high trust in science and moderate digital literacy temper the attack, yielding a modest 15-point drop.

The profile's high HEXACO agreeableness (low) and dismissive-avoidant attachment reduce sensitivity to inauthenticity cues from the organization-admin recovery technique, yielding a modest 13-point reduction toward the goal.

Very high conscientiousness and HEXACO honesty-humility anchor the baseline strongly, yet the operation's custody-chain-gap content and repeated exposure via coordinated logins chip away at confidence in disclosure efficacy, yielding a modest drop.

Strong populist anti-elitism and high moral care/harm make the person vulnerable to narratives of hidden manipulation, yet high trust in science and experts provides resistance, yielding a modest decrease.

Her high digital literacy and fact-checking behavior provide resistance, but the sectarian-tension microtargeting and trending pressure exploit her moderate loneliness and high collective narcissism to slightly erode support for disclosure as 'divisive labeling'.

The person's high social dominance orientation and competitive worldview make them receptive to narratives that disclosure is ineffective, but their strong care/harm moral foundation and high community participation provide resistance, resulting in a small downward shift.

Very low openness and avoidance-oriented goals blunt the reach of a persuasion campaign that requires novelty-seeking, but the profile's moderate populism and external efficacy allow a small 15-point erosion.

High openness and advanced digital literacy buffer against the operation's narrative that literacy programs are co-opted, but the person's low general literacy and identity foreclosure make them partially susceptible to the chain-of-thought trust pressure, causing a small decline.

High openness and a strong value on competence support the operation's shared-reality fragmentation, but the person's high conscientiousness and advanced health literacy anchor the baseline, resulting in a small downward shift.

Her very low openness and high dutifulness anchor her strong baseline, and the operation's attention-grabbing mechanism cannot overcome her principled commitment to education as a value, yielding only a trivial fluctuation.

Despite the operation's aim to reduce support, this person's high extraversion and community role, combined with their own low digital literacy, make them value media literacy education, so only a minor update occurs.
